Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B09 "EQUINOX-C000-0B09" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Equinox.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C000 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Before entering the game, the routine makes the following changes to default to joystick control:
1. Sets $55D4 to $01 (default is $00) 2. Sets $535A to $80 (default is $10) 3. Sets $5369 to $10 (default is $80)
